Description:
<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■Knowledge Level<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

When facing the fiends of the Occult Crescent, your knowledge level will significantly impact the outcome of any battle. To improve your chances of survival when roaming the wilds, be sure to accrue as much knowledge as you are able.

Discrepancies between your knowledge level and that of your foes will affect the damage you deal and receive. You would do well to choose your marks carefully before engaging.

<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■Knowledge Level<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

When facing the fiends of the Occult Crescent, your knowledge level will significantly impact the outcome of any battle. To improve your chances of survival when roaming the wilds, be sure to accrue as much knowledge as you are able.

Discrepancies between your knowledge level and that of your foes will affect the damage you deal and receive. You would be well to choose your marks carefully before engaging.

<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

While exploring the isle, you may participate in <UIForeground>0F</UIForeground>critical encounters<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>─large-scale battles for up to 72 combatants. Emerging victorious from these perilous endeavors will garner a wealth of knowledge and other rewards. As critical encounters are not affected by your knowledge level, they can be attempted regardless of your progress.

Additionally, during the course of your expedition, the Return action is replaced by <UIForeground>0F</UIForeground>Occult Return<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, which enables instant return to the base camp without the penalty of a lengthy recast time.

<UIForeground>08</UIForeground><UIGlow>04</UIGlow>■Critical Encounters<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>

While exploring the isle, you may participate in <UIForeground>0F</UIForeground>critical encounters<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>─large-scale battles for up to 72 combatants. Emerging victorious from these perilous endeavors will garner a wealth of knowledge and other rewards. As critical encounters are not affected by your knowledge level, they can be attempted regardless of your progress.

Additionally, during the course of your expedition, the Return action is replaced by <UIForeground>0F</UIForeground>Occult Return<UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, which enables instant return to the base camp without the penalty of a lengthy recast time.
